# text-flow — Basic _(HTML/CSS)_

```css
@forward '@lucca-front/scss/src/components/text-flow';
```

```html
<div class="textFlow">
	<h1>Heading 1</h1>
	<h2>Heading 2</h2>
	<p>Paragraph</p>
	<p>Paragraph</p>
	<h2>Heading 2</h2>
	<p>Paragraph</p>
	<ul>
		<li>List item</li>
		<li>List item</li>
		<li>List item</li>
	</ul>
	<h3>Heading 3</h3>
	<p>Paragraph</p>
	<h4>Heading 4</h4>
	<ol>
		<li>List item</li>
		<li>List item</li>
		<li>List item</li>
	</ol>
</div>
```
